components.evidence: Fed-batch fermentations ... containing 1.8 L modified CGXII-P medium without MOPS. ... The CGXII-P medium (pH 7.0, adjusted with NaOH) contains per liter: 40 g glucose, 20 g (NH4)2SO4, 5 g urea, 1 g KH2PO4, 1 g K2HPO4, 1 g MgSO4·7H2O, 42 g 3-morpholinopropanesulfonic acid (MOPS), 13 mg CaCl2·2H2O, 10 mg FeSO4·7H2O, 14 mg MnSO4·5H2O, 1 mg ZnSO4·7H2O, 0.3 mg CuSO4·5H2O, 0.02 mg NiCl2·6H2O, 0.2 mg biotin, 30 mg citric acid, and 0.5 mg thiamine-HCl.

components.name: corn steep liquor (CSL)
components.evidence: When necessary, 10 g/L of yeast extract or 40 g/L of crude corn steep liquor (CSL) (Hanwha Solutions, Daejeon, Korea), and the appropriate amount of NH4Cl were added to the medium.

components.name: ammonium chloride (NH4Cl)
components.evidence: ... and the appropriate amount of NH4Cl were added to the medium.

components.name: ammonium hydroxide (NH4OH, 28% v/v)
components.evidence: The fermentation pH was maintained at 7.0 with the addition of 28% (v/v) NH4OH, and the fermentation temperature was set at 30 °C.

media.base_medium: modified CGXII-P minimal medium (CGXII-P without MOPS) supplemented with 40 g/L corn steep liquor; CGXII-P is a MOPS-buffered CGXII-type C. glutamicum minimal medium

sources_chased.what: SI Appendix Materials and Methods (culture media; fed-batch fermentation section) giving the full CGXII-P recipe and the fed-batch modifications
sources_chased.how: EuropePMC supplementaryFiles zip -> pnas.2415213121.sapp.pdf (PNAS SI Appendix); pdftotext

added: feed per liter: 700 g glucose, 1 g MgSO4·7H2O, 13 mg CaCl2·2H2O, 10 mg FeSO4·7H2O, 14 mg MnSO4·5H2O, 1 mg ZnSO4·7H2O, 0.3 mg CuSO4·5H2O, 0.02 mg NiCl2·6H2O, antibiotics, 1 mM IPTG

media.notes: Fed-batch PDC medium = 'modified CGXII-P without MOPS' + 40 g/L CSL; batch = 1.8 L, fed with a 700 g/L glucose feed that also carries MgSO4 and the same trace metals (Fe/Mn/Zn/Cu/Ni). Verified evidence: '40 g/L of CSL in fed-batch fermentation medium, the production titer reached a maximum of 62.03 g/L'. CAUTION: the prior current_components listed Co2+ (cobalt) and Fe3+, but the defined recipe contains NO cobalt salt and only Fe2+ (FeSO4·7H2O) — those two ion exchanges are model artifacts, not real ingredients (cobalt could in principle enter via undefined CSL but is not a declared component).

components.name: D-glucose
components.evidence: Flask cultivations of PDC-producing strains were performed in baffled flasks (300 mL) containing 25 mL of CGXII-P minimal medium. The CGXII-P medium (pH 7.0, adjusted with NaOH) contains per liter: 40 g glucose, 20 g (NH4)2SO4, 5 g urea, 1 g KH2PO4, 1 g K2HPO4, 1 g MgSO4·7H2O, 42 g 3-morpholinopropanesulfonic acid (MOPS), 13 mg CaCl2·2H2O, 10 mg FeSO4·7H2O, 14 mg MnSO4·5H2O, 1 mg ZnSO4·7H2O, 0.3 mg CuSO4·5H2O, 0.02 mg NiCl2·6H2O, 0.2 mg biotin, 30 mg citric acid, and 0.5 mg thiamine-HCl.

media.base_medium: CGXII-P minimal medium (MOPS-buffered CGXII-type C. glutamicum minimal medium) supplemented with 40 g/L corn steep liquor

sources_chased.what: SI Appendix Materials and Methods, 'Flask cultivations' — full CGXII-P recipe
Main-text confirmation of 40 g/L CSL in flask cultivation

media.notes: Flask-cultivation PDC medium = full CGXII-P (42 g/L MOPS retained) + 40 g/L CSL. This differs from the fed-batch record only by the presence of MOPS buffer (fed-batch drops MOPS). CAUTION: prior current_components listed Co2+ (cobalt) and Fe3+; the defined recipe has NO cobalt salt and only Fe2+ (FeSO4·7H2O) — those ion exchanges are model artifacts, not declared ingredients.
